mapper.sql: snapshot_id, source_id, article_key, concept_id, title, content, lifecycle, compiled_at, source_paths, metadata_json::text as metadata_json, summary, referential_keywords, depends_on, related, confidence, review_status, snapshot_reason, captured_at
mapper.insert: insert into article_snapshots ( source_id, article_key, concept_id, title, content, lifecycle, compiled_at, source_paths, metadata_json, summary, referential_keywords, depends_on, related, confidence, review_status, snapshot_reason, captured_at ) values ( #{record.sourceId}, #{record.articleKey}, #{record.conceptId}, #{record.title}, #{record.content}, #{record.lifecycle}, #{record.compiledAt}, #{record.sourcePaths,typeHandler=com.xbk.lattice.infra.persistence.mybatis.StringListArrayTypeHandler}, #{record.metadataJson,typeHandler=com.xbk.lattice.infra.persistence.mybatis.PostgresJsonbTypeHandler}, #{record.summary}, #{record.referentialKeywords,typeHandler=com.xbk.lattice.infra.persistence.mybatis.StringListArrayTypeHandler}, #{record.dependsOn,typeHandler=com.xbk.lattice.infra.persistence.mybatis.StringListArrayTypeHandler}, #{record.related,typeHandler=com.xbk.lattice.infra.persistence.mybatis.StringListArrayTypeHandler}, #{record.confidence}, #{record.reviewStatus}, #{record.snapshotReason}, #{record.capturedAt} )
mapper.select: select from article_snapshots order by captured_at desc, snapshot_id desc limit #{limit}
